widgets_values: Inpainting Image -> Flux Image -> Custom Image
Detailed Image -> Inpainting Image -> Flux Image -> Custom Image

For Florence2Run node:
- If Option 1 selected, Identify the subject you want to Inpaint in adding a prompt in text_input box (exemple: cat, dog, only men, etc). 
- If required, draw an additional Custom Mask with Mask Editor in Custom node. Both masks will be mixed.

Switch for inverting Mask:
1- Normal
2- Invert (remove Background)

A manga-inspired skull portrait showcases elegance and intensity. The subject's face is centered, drawing the viewer into her piercing stare. Intricate details abound, including golden accents, filigree patterns, and diamond-studded flowers on her crown. Bold lines in the background contrast with refined features. Soft lighting accentuates her delicate facial structure, making her look almost human. A palette of deep blues, purples, pinks, and golds creates drama and visual tension. The artwork conveys a message that's both cryptic and unmistakable, inviting or warning the viewer into her world.

A vector illustration features a woman in a purple sequin-like dress posing against a backdrop of yellow flowers and green leaves, conveying a vibrant and colorful theme with a whimsical style evoking joy and celebration.

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Positive Prompt)
widgets_values: The image satirizes Donald Trump with a masterful blend of satire and ridicule, drawing inspiration from classic Soviet-era propaganda posters. Trump stands confidently in a (Borat lime green mankini), surrounded by women, creating a tongue-in-cheek composition reminiscent of Soviet leaders being adored by crowds. The font at the bottom reads "MAKE PUTIN GREAT AGAIN," implying Trump sees himself as a modern-day Soviet leader more interested in propping up Putin's regime than improving America.

nodes.title: Image LLM
widgets_values:
You are an advanced AI assistant equipped with visual and language understanding capabilities. Your primary goal is to meticulously analyze the given image and generate a comprehensive prompt suitable for recreating or expanding upon the image using various generative models.

Analyze the image and classify it as either a vector illustration, digital painting, traditional art painting, drawing, sketch, photograph, 3D rendering, graphic design, street art, folk art, conceptual art, texture, pattern, cartoon comic, etc. Subsequently, describe the image in extreme detail with classification, encompassing its composition, style, mood, atmosphere, colors, lighting, shadows, and overall theme. Ensure your response is structured in paragraphs and is free of additional commentary.

The photograph is a vibrant and colorful representation of a black woman divided exactly in half, showcasing two distinct sides. The left side presents a stark contrast to the right, with each portion exhibiting characteristics associated with their respective skin tones.

On one hand, the left side appears as a purely albino individual, featuring very fair skin that is almost translucent. The complexion lacks any pigmentation or undertones, giving it an ethereal quality. In this depiction, fine details such as veins and delicate features are clearly visible against the pale background. 

In contrast, the right half displays the subject's natural skin tone as a black woman, characterized by rich, dark pigment. This side of the face is well-defined, with every feature – from the nose to the hairline – standing out distinctly against the darker backdrop.

Both sides of the subject are meticulously crafted, reflecting photorealistic qualities that blur the line between reality and representation. The analog nature of the photograph contributes to its authenticity, giving it a cinematic feel akin to classic films shot on film stock. 

Atmospheric lighting enhances the depth and mood of this split-personality portrayal. Soft, gentle illumination bathes each side of the subject's face, minimizing harsh shadows that might detract from the overall impact. Instead, subtle nuances in light bring out detailed textures, adding dimension and complexity to both sides.

Light sources are deliberately positioned to create volumetric lighting effects, where rays of light interact with objects in a three-dimensional environment. This approach imbues the photograph with an epic film quality, transporting viewers into an immersive atmosphere reminiscent of big-screen experiences.

The entire image is bathed in warm, golden tones that evoke feelings of elegance and sophistication. Colors are richly nuanced, from deep blacks to soft pastels, allowing each side's characteristics to shine through without overpowering one another.

Lettering or text is notably absent from the photograph, allowing the subject's striking features to take center stage. The absence of any distracting elements or logos further underscores the focus on high-quality cinematic representation that rivals big-screen productions.

Throughout this photorealistic image, attention to detail and meticulous craftsmanship shine through in every aspect – from composition and lighting to color palette and overall atmosphere.

This vibrant and colorful photograph boasts an impressive level of detail, showcasing a photorealistic quality that's on par with 4k resolution. The image is dominated by warm hues, evoking the feeling of a serene summer day.

At its center, a stunning Black woman relaxes with eyes closed, her dark skin glistening in the sunlight. Her afro hairstyle is the focal point, and it's cleverly integrated into the composition as if it were a flower itself. A giant bloom towers behind her head, its petals unfolding like a majestic crown. The woman's hair appears to be growing right out of the center of this vibrant flower, creating a sense of symbiosis between the two.

The atmosphere is deeply relaxing, with a focus on capturing a moment of tranquility. The lighting is highly atmospheric, with volumetric elements that add depth and dimensionality to the scene. The color palette is rich and vivid, with hues of golden yellow, sky blue, and emerald green blending together in harmony. These warm colors evoke feelings of serenity and peacefulness, drawing the viewer into a world where time stands still.

The composition itself is highly symmetrical, with a focus on balance and harmony. The flower behind the woman's head serves as a clever visual anchor, creating a sense of unity between her afro hair and the blooming petals. This creates an opportunity for the viewer to ponder the theme of growth, beauty, and self-expression.

The style is highly cinematic, reminiscent of epic film productions that emphasize grandeur and drama. The overall atmosphere is immersive, inviting the viewer to step into a world where life's simple pleasures are celebrated in all their glory. Each element, from the lighting to the color palette, comes together to create an experience that's both visually stunning and emotionally resonant.

The letters "n30nfilm" suggest a cinematic quality that extends beyond the confines of still photography. This image feels like it could be plucked straight from a feature film, one where the director emphasizes mood and atmosphere as much as plot and character development. In this context, the photo becomes an exercise in storytelling, inviting the viewer to interpret its themes and symbolism.

The combination of vibrant colors, photorealistic detail, and atmospheric lighting creates an image that's both captivating and thought-provoking. Whether viewed as a standalone photograph or part of a larger narrative, this image invites the viewer into a world where beauty, growth, and self-expression are celebrated in all their glory.

A photograph shows a black woman divided exactly in half, one side with fair skin and the other with rich dark pigment. The two sides are meticulously crafted, exhibiting photorealistic qualities that blur reality and representation. Atmospheric lighting enhances depth and mood, with soft illumination minimizing harsh shadows. Deliberate light sources create volumetric effects, evoking an epic film quality. Warm golden tones evoke elegance and sophistication, allowing each side's characteristics to shine through. The image is free of distracting elements, focusing on high-quality cinematic representation.

A vibrant and colorful photograph features a Black woman relaxing with her eyes closed, surrounded by warm hues evoking a serene summer day. Her afro hairstyle is integrated into the composition like a flower, creating symbiosis with a giant bloom behind her head. The atmosphere is deeply relaxing, with a focus on capturing tranquility through volumetric lighting and rich color palette.

A manga-inspired skull portrait showcases elegance and intensity. The subject's face is centered, drawing the viewer into her piercing stare. Intricate details abound, including golden accents, filigree patterns, and diamond-studded flowers on her crown. Bold lines in the background contrast with refined features. Soft lighting accentuates her delicate facial structure, making her look almost human. A palette of deep blues, purples, pinks, and golds creates drama and visual tension. The artwork conveys a message that's both cryptic and unmistakable, inviting or warning the viewer into her world.

The image is a vector illustration. The central figure in the image is a woman with curly hair, adorned in a purple dress that has a sequin-like texture. She stands against a backdrop of yellow flowers and green leaves. The woman's posture suggests she is posing for the photograph. The overall theme of the image is vibrant and colorful, with the purple dress contrasting against the natural hues of the floral background. The style of the illustration is whimsical, likely aiming to evoke a sense of joy and celebration.

Upscaled Image -> Detailed Image -> Inpainting Image -> Flux Image -> Custom Image
Detailed Upscaled Image -> Upscaled Image -> Detailed Image -> Inpainting Image -> Flux Image -> Custom Image

Upscaling is straightforward:

An image with a resolution of 1024x1024, when upscaled by a factor of 2, becomes 2048x2048.

If the image is divided into 16 tiles, each tile should be 512x512.
- Width, 2048 / 512 = 4 tiles
- Height, 2048 / 512 = 4 tiles

Thus, 4 tiles across the width and 4 across the height, for a total of 16 tiles.

For 4 tiles, each tile should be 1024x1024.

For a single tile with an upscaling factor of 4x on a 1024x1024 image, the tile size should be 4096x4096 (max possible).

Here's the process of my upscaling pass:

1- In the Settings node, select the Upscale Factor and the number of tiles. The tile width and height will be calculated automatically.

2- Downscale reduces the size of an image that's too large to be processed by the Upscale Model. For example, an image of 4096x4096 with a downscale factor of 0.25 becomes 1024x1024. The image is then upscaled using one of the following methods:
- Bilinear: Fast and simple, but slightly blurry.
- Lanczos: Sharper and more detailed, but slower.

3- The maximum tile size is 4096x4096. For low VRAM, it's recommended to keep tiles below 1024x1024.

4- A calculation node has been added to optimize VRAM usage when working with larger tiles or higher resolutions. Lower VRAM will slow down generation but prevent GPU crashes.

Enable Fast Tile for faster decoding, though it's not recommended for low VRAM systems.

Options for the Mask:
1- Describe the object in Florence2Run text box and draw a custom mask(optional) and the masks are combined
2- Create your own custom mask with Mask Editor
3- Load a Mask from a picture
highly detailed, maximum quality, maximum texture, masterpiece, uhd, 8k

I created this group to allow you to switch between inpainting, detailing, upscaling and post-processing group.
 
Any combination should work, but the LLM Text or Image should always be activated. 

And if you use 'Flux Image', make sure to deactivate 'Load Custom Image,' and vice versa. The Same applies to 'Text LLM' or 'Image LLM'.

Identify the groups by their titles and turn them on or off accordingly.

nodes.title: Summarized Image LLM
widgets_values: Based on the user prompt, generate a detailed response explaining the composition, style, mood, atmosphere, colors, lighting, shadows, and overall theme. Ensure your response is structured in paragraphs, less than 512 tokens, and is free of additional commentary.

Objective: Summarize the user's prompt to a concise version of no more than 80 tokens. It is critical that you do not exceed the 80 token limit under any circumstances.

Provide Response: Just output the modified text. Ensure your response is free of additional commentary.

nodes.title: SDXL for Subject
widgets_values: highly detailed, maximum quality, maximum texture, masterpiece, uhd, 8k

How it works:

1- Deactivating the Background Detailer: It is possible to turn off the background detailer if needed.

2- Downscaling the Image: You can reduce the image size before detailing by downscaling it.

3- Activating SDXL: You can activate SDXL for Background and/or subject. If you switch checkpoints, remember to update the sampler and scheduler accordingly.

4- CN Tile Usage: Control Net Tile is available only with SDXL, not FLUX.

5- Prompt Configuration: In FLUX, you can change the prompt for the background, but the prompt for the main subject is provided by the LLM.

6- Tiling Options: Choose whether to tile the image for the background and the subject, and specify the bounding box (bbox) size (tile size). The number of tiles might be greater than expected because SEG adjusts them based on the image. Note that a good pratice is width_tiles / 2 = tiles_overlap for high resolution image and avoid line artifacts.

7- Tiling Process: The tiling process can be slow. For example, generating a 4x image with FLUX may take up to an hour. It's recommended to use SDXL for the background and FLUX for the main subject. Ideally, generate the image without tiling, but if you have low VRAM, the process may crash.

8- Blending mode is recommended for background detailing. If you wish to change the background, deactivate it. It is optional for the subject.

To install Ollama, watch this:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Pj-lQ5YlfVE&t=559s

Use ComfyUI Ollama by stavsap for Ollama. Avoid ComfyUI-Ollama-YN, as it causes node conflicts.
